result:
The task has been completed successfully. The R script has been executed and produced the cleaned data file at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 observations and 5 variables (NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, educdtlpa). The script:

1. Loaded all three wave files from data/input/ using readr::read_delim()
2. Merged datasets using full_join by NSID
3. Consolidated maternal (educdtlma) and paternal (educdtlpa) education variables prioritizing W2 > W1 > W4
4. Created collapsed education variables (educma, educpa) mapping 20 detailed categories to 5-level NVQ scheme
5. Harmonized missing codes to standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Not applicable, -1=Item not applicable)
6. Applied value labels to all variables
7. Converted to labelled factor variables
8. Saved output to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
